description.description: The answer variation description that is shown on the search results page.

displayName.description: The answer variation name that is displayed in search results.

languageTag.description: The country or region that can view this answer variation.

platform.description: The device or operating system that can view this answer variation. The possible values are: android, androidForWork, ios, macOS, windowsPhone81, windowsPhone81AndLater, windows10AndLater, androidWorkProfile, unknown, androidASOP, androidMobileApplicationManagement, iOSMobileApplicationManagement, unknownFutureValue.

webUrl.description: The URL link for the answer variation. When users select this answer variation from the search results, they're directed to the specified URL.
